[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m [38;5;183mDexType[39m, [38;5;183mDexField[39m, [38;5;183mDexMethod[39m, and [38;5;183mDexProto[39m have
  [38;5;183mCompareTo[39m methods, but they don't exactly match
  the [38;5;183mOrdered[39m or [38;5;183mStructuralItem[39m interfaces in
  [38;5;183mutils/structural[39m. I'll now search for a
  [38;5;183mDexReference[39m interface in the [38;5;183mdex[39m package to see
  if it exists and how it's defined.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mShell[0m [38;5;103mgrep -r "type .* interface" . [in[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m Command exited with code: 1                 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m No interfaces in the [38;5;183mdex[39m package? That's
  surprising. I'll check [38;5;183mbinary_reader.go[39m and
  [38;5;183mvdex.go[39m to see if I missed anything there.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/binary_reader.go[39m  [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m Formalizing [38;5;183mDexItem[39m and [38;5;183mDexReference[39m as Go
  interfaces hasn't happened yet, as porting is
  still ongoing. The current manual type
  dispatching isn't ideal for Go, but it's where we
  are. I'll check [38;5;183mr8_go/src/dex/dex_edge_test.go[39m to
  see if there are any other interesting
  developments.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/dex_edge_test.go[39m  [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m I've made significant headway today by
  refactoring [38;5;183mdex_string.go[39m into specialized files,
  expanding [38;5;183mDexItemFactory[39m with more common Java
  types, and centralizing the [38;5;183mSign[39m utility. Now,
  I'll take a look at [38;5;183mdex_value.go[39m to see if
  there's anything else in the [38;5;183mdex[39m package that
  needs attention.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/dex_value.go[39m      [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m [38;5;183mDexValue[39m looks like a barebones placeholder right
  now, especially compared to the full hierarchy in
  R8. I'll check [38;5;183mencoded_value.go[39m to see if the
  more complex [38;5;183mEncodedValue[39m types are already
  implemented.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/encoded_value.go[39m  [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦ encoded_value.go[39m is just encoding helpers, so the
  full [38;5;183mDexValue[39m hierarchy from R8—including types
  like [38;5;183mDexValueInt[39m, [38;5;183mDexValueString[39m, and
  [38;5;183mDexValueArray[39m—is missing. Since I've already
  tackled the other basic Dex graph nodes, [38;5;183mDexValue
[39m  is the logical next step. I'll check
  [38;5;183mdex_value_test.go[39m to see what's already covered
  before I start implementing the hierarchy.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/encoded_value_te[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m [38;5;183mencoded_value_test.go[39m only covers encoding, and
  while [38;5;183mencoded_value.go[39m uses [38;5;183mmath/bits[39m, my test
  could use it too. I'm moving on to [38;5;183mDexValue[39m,
  which in R8 is a full-fledged [38;5;183mDexItem[39m subclass.
  I'll define it as an interface in Go, but first,
  I'll check for an existing [38;5;183mDexValueVisitor[39m to see
  if I need to implement one.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mShell[0m [38;5;103mgrep -r "DexValueVisitor" . [in r[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m Command exited with code: 1                 [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦[39m No visitor found. I'll move on to implementing
  [38;5;183mDexValueByte[39m, [38;5;183mDexValueInt[39m, and [38;5;183mDexValueString[39m, as
  [38;5;183mDexItem[39m is currently missing and likely just a
  marker interface anyway. I've already refactored
  [38;5;183mdex_string.go[39m, expanded [38;5;183mDexItemFactory[39m, and
  extracted [38;5;183mSign[39m, so I'll take a look at [38;5;183mheader.go[39m
  and [38;5;183mmap_entries.go[39m next to see if they need
  similar treatment.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/header.go[39m         [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦ header.go[39m is solid, so I'll check
  [38;5;183mr8_go/src/dex/container[39m next.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFolder[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/container[39m       [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m Listed 2 item(s).                           [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦ [39mChecking [38;5;183mr8_go/src/dex/container/policy.go[39m.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103mr8_go/src/dex/container/policy[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦ [39mI've improved the [38;5;183mdex[39m package's structure and
  testing, and now I'm considering [38;5;183mDexValue[39m as the
  next step. But first, I'll check
  [38;5;183mbase_compiler_command_parser.go[39m and
  [38;5;183mparse_flag_info_impl.go[39m to see if they need
  refactoring.

[38;5;59m╭─────────────────────────────────────────────╮[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m [38;5;151m✓[39m  [1mReadFile[0m [38;5;103m.../base_compiler_command_pars[39m… [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m│[39m                                             [38;5;59m│[39m
[38;5;59m╰─────────────────────────────────────────────╯[39m
[38;5;183m✦ [39mCode looks good. I've refactored [38;5;183mdex_string.go[39m,
  expanded [38;5;183mDexItemFactory[39m, moved the [38;5;183mSign[39m utility,
  and updated the tests. I'm ready to move on to
  [38;5;183mDexValue[39m or whatever's next on the agenda. Any
  preference?

[30m[48;5;234m▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀
[39m [38;5;183m> [38;5;103m프로젝트 코드 분석해봐. 개선포인트를 찾고[39m
   [38;5;103m하나씩 진행하자.[39m
[30m▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄▄

[38;5;59m───────────────────────────────────────────────────
